question: 请核查R004239和R004240是否构成重复报销、拆分报销或业务招待费超标准。必须核对发票、日期、单次金额和人均金额；若不构成异常，请明确说明无异常、原因和制度依据。

audit_scope.organization_scope: E0008 杨丹, D008 合规风控部

policies.condition: 同一员工、同一费用类型在7天内出现2笔及以上报销,且合计金额达到较高审批线
同一客户拜访或同一会议安排不得拆分为多个报销事项

evidence_requirements: Expense detail for R004239 and R004240
Invoice usage for both invoice numbers
Any other records for E0008 in the surrounding 7-day window

execution_steps.description: Create audit plan and record planning_completed checkpoint
Verify applicable policy versions and clauses
Retrieve expense details, check invoice usage, list nearby records
Compare records against duplicate, split, and excessive rules
Form preliminary findings and record investigation_completed checkpoint

complexity_reasons: Multiple policies involved (3: expense reimbursement, business entertainment, authorization management)
Multiple business rules checked (3: duplicate, split, excessive)
No aggregation/batch processing needed (only 2 known records)
No policy version ambiguity (all 2025 policies, clear applicability)

subagent_plan.reason: Complexity 2 with only 2 known records. Direct policy lookup and record comparison are compact enough for the main agent.

stopping_conditions: All three rules (duplicate, split, excessive) have been checked with evidence
